page.title: Billing & Subscription
page.subtitle: Manage your BuildTrack plan, checkout status, and subscription details.
card.cta.hint: Subscription management is being finalized for beta. Contact support if you need billing help.
card.cta.hintAlternative: Starts a new checkout — it doesn't replace your current subscription automatically.
selectedFromSignup.title: Plan selected during signup
selectedFromSignup.body: This is the plan you chose when registering. You can change it before continuing to Paddle's secure checkout.
activation.required.title: Complete your subscription to activate BuildTrack.
activation.required.body: Your account was created, but your workspace is not active yet.
activation.required.cta: Start checkout to begin your 14-day trial.
activation.pending.title: Checkout in progress
activation.pending.body: We're waiting for Paddle to confirm your payment. Until then, the workspace stays locked. You can retry checkout below.
activation.statusError.title: We couldn't verify your subscription status.
activation.statusError.body: Please refresh or contact support. The workspace stays locked until we can confirm your subscription.
status.title: Current subscription
status.configured: Local billing state confirmed by Paddle webhooks.
status.empty.title: No subscription yet
status.headline.pastDue: Your last payment is past due.
status.headline.paymentRequired: A new payment method is required.
status.headline.error: We couldn't verify your subscription status.
status.body.active: You have full access to BuildTrack. Manage your plan below.
status.body.trialing: You're enjoying BuildTrack on a free trial. Manage your plan before it ends.
status.body.pending: We're waiting for Paddle to confirm your payment. You can refresh the status or retry checkout.
status.body.missing: Choose a plan to start your 14-day trial.
status.body.pastDue: Please retry checkout to settle the balance and keep your workspace active.
status.body.paymentRequired: Start a new checkout with an updated payment method to reactivate billing.
status.body.canceled: Reactivate by starting a new checkout below.
status.body.expired: Choose a plan below to reactivate BuildTrack.
status.body.incomplete: Finish checkout so we can complete your subscription setup.
status.body.unknown: Refresh the status — if this persists, contact support.
status.body.error: Refresh the page or try again. If the issue continues, contact support.
manage.title: Manage subscription
manage.subtitle: Update your plan, cancel, or review billing history.
manage.changePlan.title: Change plan
manage.changePlan.body: Switch to a different BuildTrack plan.
manage.cancel.title: Cancel subscription
manage.cancel.body: End your BuildTrack subscription at the end of the current period.
manage.invoices.title: Billing history
manage.invoices.body: Download invoices and view past payments.
manage.notice.cancelBody: Cancellation management is coming soon for beta. Contact support if you need to cancel today.
manage.notice.changePlanBody: Plan changes are coming soon for beta. For now you can start a checkout for any plan from the section below — but it won't replace your current subscription automatically.
manage.notice.invoicesBody: Invoice history will be available in a future release. Contact support if you need a receipt today.
plans.title: Available plans
plans.subtitleDefault: Pick the plan that fits your operation. Billing is handled securely by Paddle — we never store your card details.
plans.subtitleActive: You can start a checkout for any plan. Plan switching from inside the app is coming soon.
error.title: We couldn't open checkout
error.generic: Something went wrong starting the payment. Please try again in a moment.
error.missingToken: The payments integration isn't configured. Please contact support.
error.network: We can't reach the server right now. Check your connection and try again.
success.title: We're processing your subscription
success.body: We're processing your subscription. Activation will be confirmed automatically once Paddle notifies us of the payment.
success.note: You can close this tab — we'll email you when it's ready.
cancel.title: Checkout canceled
cancel.body: No charge was made. You can come back to the plans any time, or keep using your current account.
